title: Embedded workforms and Monday.com CSP
excerpt: Hi all, I’m pretty new to monday.com so please forgive me if my question exposes a lack of platform knowledge. I have just created my first lead form in Monday CRM and want to embed this in my site. However, when the ifr…

posts.author: catn0b0t (Cedric)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi all, I’m pretty new to monday.com so please forgive me if my question exposes a lack of platform knowledge. I have just created my first lead form in Monday CRM and want to embed this in my site. However, when the iframe loads, I immediately run into Mondays Content-Security-Policy which prohibits me from embedding this form into my site. Then my question is: what is even the point of offering this functionality if I cannot embed it in external/non-approved sites? Or am I missing crucial setting somewhere?

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Cedric! Welcome to the monday Community.

Hmm. Could you please share what you’re seeing when the iframe pop-up appears? This sounds atypical to me. Testing in my demo account, when I click on the “Embed form” option, clicking on the “Copy code” button does not trigger any messages on my end:

image593×344 18.8 KB

If you open your form’s board via a private or incognito web browser window and complete the same steps, do you still run into the same message?
